## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Contract/API change
- [ ] Documentation change
- [ ] Test change
- [ ] Example change
- [ ] Maintenance change

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the project dependency-free.
- [ ] I avoided real credentials, private paths, and production service details.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples when behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran `python -m unittest discover -s tests`.
- [ ] I ran `python examples/run_fake_job.py`.

## Compatibility notes

Does this change break existing manifests, adapters, or trace consumers?

## Screenshots or logs, if relevant

Attach terminal output or screenshots that demonstrate the change.
